name: Azure Speech
description: Azure AI Speech text-to-speech (MP3, native Ogg/Opus voice notes, PCM telephony) and realtime speech-to-text transcription for voice-call.

apiKey.description: Azure Speech resource key. Falls back to AZURE_SPEECH_KEY, AZURE_SPEECH_API_KEY, or SPEECH_KEY.

region.description: Azure Speech resource region, for example eastus. Falls back to AZURE_SPEECH_REGION or SPEECH_REGION.

endpoint.description: Optional Azure Speech endpoint/base URL override.

baseUrl.description: Optional Azure Speech base URL override.

outputFormat.description: Azure Speech X-Microsoft-OutputFormat for audio-file output.

voiceNoteOutputFormat.description: Azure Speech X-Microsoft-OutputFormat for voice-note output.

language.description: Realtime STT primary recognition language (BCP-47), e.g. en-US, zh-CN. Defaults to en-US.

sampleRate.description: Realtime STT input audio sample rate in Hz (default 8000 to match telephony / Twilio media stream).

encoding.description: Realtime STT input audio encoding (default mulaw for telephony; use pcm for 16-bit linear).

initialSilenceTimeoutMs.description: Realtime STT timeout (ms) before any speech is detected (default 5000).

endSilenceTimeoutMs.description: Realtime STT trailing-silence threshold (ms) for finalizing an utterance (default 800).

candidateLanguages.description: Realtime STT auto language detection candidates, e.g. ["en-US","zh-CN"]. When set, replaces the single `language` setting.
